message:
feat(refinery): add pre-verification fast-path for merge queue (gt-lu84)

Add pre-verification fields to MRInfo (PreVerified, PreVerifiedAt,
PreVerifiedBase) populated from MR bead metadata. When a polecat submits
a pre-verified MR and the target HEAD matches the verified base SHA,
the refinery skips all quality gates and fast-forward merges in ~5s.

If the target has moved since verification (stale base), gates run normally.
